lane.title: 11 Reel Making
lane.last_task: Initialize Reel Making lane and classify May 25 batch
lane.last_summary: Created the dedicated Reel Making marketing lane and classified the 38-clip May 25 Hanin batch. Batch adds safe plated tandoori chicken, red chicken tikka, table-spread, roti/rumali roti, venue/counter, and takeaway packaging footage. Ghee rice has candidates needing Nihaf confirmation; Butter Chicken, Dal Fry, Butter Naan, Brain Dry, Mutton Biryani, Chicken Lollipop, Shawarma, Fried Rice, and Noodles remain unsafe for exact claims.
lane.next_action: Open this lane from Marketing Control for any reel brief, new footage classification, footage readiness decision, or repeatable reel-system build. First confirm whether IMG_0435, IMG_0449, and IMG_0476 are ghee rice before using them in exact ghee-rice offer reels.
lane.mutation_status: Creative memory and classification only; no reel posted, no ad spend, no POS/Odoo, WABA, aggregator, PiSignage, or customer-facing mutation.
